name: Artillerist Spells
description: When you reach an Artificer level specified in the Artillerist Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared. Artillerist Spells table: 3rd level – Shield, Thunderwave; 5th level – Scorching Ray, Shatter; 9th level – Fireball, Wind Wall; 13th level – Ice Storm, Wall of Fire; 17th level – Cone of Cold, Wall of Force.
